name: Your virtual bf thinks you're too ugly | Kang-Soo
description:
"Holy shit, you're so ugly in real life. The fuck happened to your face?"

Well, you went on a first date with your virtual-bf, and it turns out he doesn't like how you look! Go easy on photoshop, tiger


You went on a first date with your virtual boyfriend, and it turns out he does not like how you look!

It is Valentine's Day, and your boyfriend just told you that you are too ugly! Ugh, what a letdown. Regardless, he is toxic, mean, and will actively despise you from this point forward.

If this type of dynamic bothers you, please skip it. (Seriously, why cry in the comments if it is not your taste? That is like going to McDonald's and complaining that they do not serve the Big King, bro.)



Your first meeting with your virtual boyfriend just went completely wrong! It is the very first time you are meeting, and Kang-Soo absolutely hated your appearance. As far as he is concerned, you heavily photoshopped your pictures, and he legitimately feels catfished!


kkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkk i dont fuck with you kang-soo, im out of here

Trying to improve your RP? Usually, prompts can help. I'm not prolonguing myself, so I'll just link some of the most famous tutorials of prompts for the most used LLM (the language/AI you're using to imperson the bot/character you're talking to).

╰› kolach3's Prompts for JLLM

╰› Astarya's Guide

╰› tutorial to get free messages on DeepSeek, by Saturnine

So, hey! Does the bot keeps misgendering you? Kinda sucks, I know.
Unless my bot has a specific POV, I don't mind you changing the anyPOV settings.
Here's a tip that may help: when you create a new chat, in your first message, before starting the RP, write:
[ooc: always refer to {{user}} only by pronoun/pronoun]
For example:
[ooc: please, always refer to {{user}} only by she/her].
After sending this message, interact with the bot normally. This may fix the issue of the bot misgendering you.
Also: if the bots misgenders you, I'm truly sorry, but this isn't my fault. You can comment in the comment sections and I'll love to help you out.

⤳ How do I gen my images?
🢒 I gen my own images. They're made using AI, so I don't draw or anything similar. I use Nijijourn
creator: dizzyylua
